title: Unifying Marketing Data Across Disparate Platforms
excerpt: A data-driven organization managed performance data across numerous advertising and lead-generation platforms, each with inconsistent schemas and ingestion constraints.

seo.title: Unifying Marketing Data Across Disparate Platforms
seo.description: A data-driven organization managed performance data across numerous advertising and lead-generation platforms, each with inconsistent schemas and ingestion constraints.

challenge: A data-driven organization managed performance data across numerous advertising and lead-generation platforms, each with inconsistent schemas and ingestion constraints.
whatWeDid: Designed ingestion pipelines combining standard connectors and custom integrations, modeled and consolidated data into a unified warehouse, and standardized KPIs for reporting.
outcome: A single, reliable source of truth for marketing performance, enabling teams to optimize spend and make decisions with confidence.
